zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Surdeval於1073年出生時，她的父親Richard Surdeval51歲，母親Mrs Richard de Surdeval44歲。她於1084年之前與Ralph Paynel結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1097年在英國越可爾胡頓 帕格爾享年24歲。

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Surdeval was born in 1073, her father, Richard Surdeval, was 51 and her mother, Mrs Richard de Surdeval, was 44. She married Ralph Paynel before 1084. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1097, in Hooton Pagnell, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 24.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Surdeval est née en 1073, son père, Richard Surdeval, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Mrs Richard de Surdeval, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Paynel avant 1084. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1097, à Hooton Pagnell, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 24 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Surdeval 1073 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Surdeval 51 und ihre Mutter Mrs Richard de Surdeval 44. Sie hat vor 1084 Ralph Paynel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1097 im Alter von 24 Jahren in Hooton Pagnell, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Surdeval è nata il nel 1073, sua padre, Richard Surdeval, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Mrs Richard de Surdeval, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Ralph Paynel prima del 1084. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1097, nel Hooton Pagnell, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 24 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Surdevalが1073年に生まれた時，父Richard Surdevalは51歳，母Mrs Richard de Surdevalは44歳であった。1084年以前にRalph Paynelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1097年にイギリスヨークシュアイアホーオトン プアグネルで24歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Surdeval(이)가 1073년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Surdeval(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Richard de Surdeval(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1084년 이전 Ralph Paynel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1097년 영국 요르크실르 후턴 파그넬에서 24세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Surdeval nasceu em 1073, seu pai, Richard Surdeval, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Richard de Surdeval, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph Paynel antes 1084. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1097, em Hooton Pagnell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 24 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Surdeval родилась в 1073 г., её отцу по имени Richard Surdeval было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs Richard de Surdeval, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Paynel перед 1084 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1097 г. в местности хутон пагнелл, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 24 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud Surdeval nació en 1073, su papá, Richard Surdeval, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Mrs Richard de Surdeval, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Ralph Paynel antes de 1084. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1097, en Hooton Pagnell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 24 años.
